name: Rotisseried Chick (Hbwk07a) 1i23
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the chicken and stuff it with a small onion and a couple of garlic cloves, mashed.
2. After trussing the chicken and placing it on the spit, shake a little vermouth over it.
3. Brush a little dark soy sauce, salt, freshly ground pepper (or lemon pepper if available), garlic powder, celery seeds, and plenty of paprika onto the chicken.
4. Optionally, add crushed oregano or basil to the grill or oven/spit.
5. Cook until the juices run clear from the thigh.
6. The paprika will create a crust that helps keep the juices inside the chicken.
Note: My son who cooks this for his friends calls it 'Monogram O Chicken'. He even cooked it on television in Fukui, Japan, but they never understood why it's called 'Monogram O Chicken'!
